supported_devices: grow lights (HID/LED, up to 512), HVAC, mini-split AC, dehumidifiers, humidifiers, CO2 generators, CO2 regulators, programmable timer devices, water content sensors
compatible_ec_fans: any 0-10V EC fans (via VFSC-1 variable fan speed controller station accessory)
compatible_lights: any (via LMA series lighting adapters; backward compatible with all HCS-1 Hydro-X accessories)
compatible_sensors: TrolMaster MBS-Pro 4-in-1 sensor (temp/humidity/CO2/light), MBS-PAR full spectrum quantum sensor, WCS water content sensors, smoke detector, water detector
compatible_humidifiers: any commercial humidifier/dehumidifier (via relay device stations)
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 generator or regulator (via relay device stations)
recommended_use_note: High-end multi-zone environment controller for large professional grows and commercial facilities. Fully backward compatible with HCS-1 Hydro-X accessories. Crop calendar supports multi-week automated grow recipes. Wired Ethernet only.
uvp_notes: German retailer price incl. 19% VAT. US price approx. $2,492 (Sylvane). No official manufacturer UVP published.
notes: SKU: HCS-2. 10.1" touchscreen. Input 100–240V~/0.5A. Max 512 lights, 50 sensors, 50 device stations. Calendar-based crop recipes with automatic adjustments. Max connection distance 1000m. Web-based software in addition to TM+ app. USB port for custom screensaver and firmware updates. ETL/FCC certified. IP20 rated. Dimensions estimated from Sylvane listing (inches converted).
